experiences.description: Built ARMLS MCP Server with HTTP/SSE transport using @modelcontextprotocol/sdk v1.29.0, Zod v4, Express v5
lessons: MCP SDK v1.29.0 ships with Zod v4 (classic API) — use 'from zod' which re-exports v4/classic/external.js, backward compatible with v3 syntax
Express v5.2.1 is installed as a dependency of @modelcontextprotocol/sdk — use @types/express v5 not v4
SSEServerTransport constructor takes (endpoint: string, res: ServerResponse) — one transport per SSE connection
server.tool() takes raw Zod shape objects (NOT z.object()) as the schema parameter — ZodRawShapeCompat type
Each SSE connection should create a fresh McpServer instance for stateless design
Spark API error envelope: response.data.D.Message for error messages
When accessing nested unknown objects in TypeScript strict mode, cast intermediate objects: const envelope = data?.['D'] as Record<string, unknown>
git commit -m with spaces in message fails in cmd.exe — use git commit -F .commitmsg pattern instead
